IF NOT REPLY WITHIN TEN DAYS AFTER SERVICE, IT SHALL BECOME THE STATEMENT OF DECISION. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND SUBMIT PROPOSED JUDGMENT FOR SIGNATURE. JUDGE: A.
